page_content:
Prerequisite: ANSC101 and ANSC103.

ANSC270 Animal Enterprise Management (3 Credits)

General principles of enterprise organization, management, and operation as applicable to food, livestock, and companion animals. Enterprise planning and establishment, management of financial, human, and animal resources, and other related topics will be investigated. Prerequisite: ANSC101 and ANSC103; or permission of instructor.
